title: Maryton Coarse Nail File 80/100 Grit Emery Boards for Poly Gel Acrylic Nails, 12 PCS Professional Double Sided Wood Finger Nail Files Set Manicure Tools
features: Professional Emery Boards - 80/100 Grit nail file works great for trimming or shaping the acrylic nail with your desired shape or length. Coarse enough to remove nail gel/glue in your extended or fake nails. 80/100 GRIT NOT FOR NATURAL NAILS (you can choose our 100/180 grit nail files for natural nails)

Superior Quality Materials - The nail files are made with top quality adhesive tape and emery board materials, allows for fast, easy, and precise filing of nails, perfect for buffing acrylic nails, dipped powder nails and false nails
Easy To Use - 7*0.8*0.16 inch double sided nail files, provide you a comfortable nail doing experience. Suitable for professionals and home mani-pedi prep, give you nail salon quality results at home
Washable Nail Files - These premium emery boards can be washed with water, quick and easy to clean. 12 Pieces nail files also meet your various manicure needs

More Than Manicure Tools - Maryton nail files are great for all your filing needs, fingernails, toenails, and hobbies, crafts. But also a terrific gift for girls who love nail art as Valentine's Day gift, Birthday gift, Christmas gift and Halloween gift
Best Results with Maryton Nail Buffers
description: Product Description MARYTON has been focusing on manufacturing and selling professional foot care & nail beauty products for years, our products includes nail buffers, nail sanding blocks, nail files and professional pumice products. Maryton aims to provide you with professional grade products. MARYTON encourages innovation and share. Any suggestions about our products, welcome to share with us. Your trust is the driving force for our continuous development. MARYTON: Make Your Nails Professional Looking, Great Gift for Nail Art Lover Material: High-Quality Wood Core Emery Board Color: Grey Design: Round Top & Double Sides Size and Quantity: 80/100 Grit, pack of 20 Dimensions: 7 x 0.8 x 0.1 inch Maryton professional 80/100 grit nail files are the handy tools to maintain your beautiful Acrylic Nails, False Nails and Dip Powder Nails. High-quality wood core emery boards provide fast, easy, and precise filing of nails.. 7 inch and round top nail files, provide you a comfortable nail doing experience. 80/100 grit premium sandpaper, provide a effective nail shaping experience. DIY nail art at home, shape the nails to your desired length and shape. Suitable for different kinds and sizes nail tip, such as coffin nail, ballerina nails, oval nail, square nail, stiletto nail, French nail, acrylic nail Great for nail salons, providing the customer a comfortable nail experience.
